title: Micron finally fills in stagnant swimming pool that a national expert called dangerous
summary: Micron Technology has completed filling in an in-ground swimming pool on property acquired nearly three years ago. The pool had been flagged by a national expert as presenting safety hazards due to stagnation. This resolution addresses a previously identified environmental and public safety concern on company-owned property in Clay, NY.

political_signal.description: Corporate compliance with safety remediation standards demonstrates alignment between private sector operations and public health/safety expectations in the community.

processing_notes: No Syracuse city departments directly referenced; issue involves private corporate property in Clay, NY (adjacent municipality)
No dollar amounts or timeline specifics provided beyond 'nearly three years' ownership duration
Expert assessment of danger validates remediation necessity but expert identity not specified
Resolved categorization appropriate given completion of remedial action
